name: Ensalada De Margarita
recipeIngredient: 1 slice watermelon, cut into wedges, then cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all dressing ingredients in a jar.
2. Shake well and chill until ready to use.
3. Using the peeled pineapple flesh only, cut into 1-inch cubes.
4. Peel and cube grapefruit, oranges, and avocado (avocado should be about 1/2 inch cubed).
5. Toss the fruit cubes with the dressing in a bowl.
6. Place the lettuce greens on a serving plate, fanned out.
7. Arrange the fruit mixture over the greens.
8. Sprinkle sliced almonds on top.
9. Garnish with watermelon wedges.
10. Serve chilled on a chilled plate. This makes a refreshing summer lunch dish.
